page_content:
Prerequisite: HDCC208.

Restriction: Must be in the Design Cultures and Creativity Honors College Living/Learning program.

Repeatable to: 6 credits if content differs.

Courses in 2025-2026 Academic Catalog - DRAFT COPY 257

HDCC379 Design Cultures and Creativity Independent Study (1-3 Credits) Involves research and/or creative scholarship directed by individual DCC faculty outside of the formal classroom structure.
